name: humanspec_KIR_cluster_bonobo
description: Human-specific duplicon contrast: KIR_cluster. Status in Pan paniscus: 'KIR_haplotype_variable'. In human (GRCh38) the locus sits on chr19:~54.8 Mb; in this ape the syntenic region is approximated on chr19. Used by LLmap to refuse silent absorption of human-vs-ape divergence when mapping cross-species reads.

architecture.internal_structure: Reference contrast for KIR_cluster. See Dennis 2012, Suntsova 2017, T2T-ape 2024 for duplicon-by-duplicon presence calls.

related_diseases: human-specific cortex expansion / neurodevelopmental dosage (e.g. KIR_cluster)
